basic_details.job_title: CSIR-CFTRI Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 12 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: CSIR - Central Food Technological Research Institute, Mysuru
basic_details.short_information: CSIR - Central Food Technological Research Institute, Mysuru (CSIR-CFTRI) Project Associate - I Notification 2026 has been released on 05 June 2026 on the official website. A total of 12 vacancies have been announced through the CSIR-CFTRI Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/PwBD/Women: 5 years, OBC: 3 years

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Microbiology/Biotechnology, M.Sc. in Biochemistry/Biotechnology, B.E in Computer Science with AI&ML, M.Sc. in Chemistry/Polymer Science OR B.E/B.Tech in Polymer Science, M.Sc. in Food Science & Nutrition/Food Technology OR B.E/B.Tech in Food Science & Technology
qualification.details: Project Associate - I (Microbiology/Biotechnology): M.Sc. in Microbiology/Biotechnology Project Associate - I (Biochemistry/Biotechnology): M.Sc. in Biochemistry/Biotechnology Project Associate - I (Computer Science with AI&ML): B.E in Computer Science with AI&ML Project Associate - I (Chemistry/Polymer Science or Polymer Science): M.Sc. in Chemistry/Polymer Science OR B.E/B.Tech in Polymer Science Project Associate - I (Food Science & Nutrition/Food Technology or Food Science & Technology): M.Sc. in Food Science & Nutrition/Food Technology OR B.E/B.Tech in Food Science & Technology

vacancy_details.Post Name: Project Associate - I (Computer Science with AI&ML)
Project Associate - I (Chemistry/Polymer Science or Polymer Science)
Project Associate - I (Food Science & Nutrition/Food Technology or Food Science & Technology)

category_wise_vacancy.Post Name: Project Associate - I (Food Science & Nutrition/Food Technology or Food Science & Technology)

all_official_links.label: Download CSIR-CFTRI Project Associate - I Notification PDF 2026

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for CSIR-CFTRI Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews are scheduled to be held on 16th June 2026 and 17th June 2026. Candidates should ensure they report to the venue on these dates.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate - I post?
faq.answer: A total of 12 vacancies are available for the Project Associate - I position at CSIR-CFTRI, Mysuru, as per Advertisement No. PAT 24/2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate - I posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary by specialization and include M.Sc. degrees in Microbiology, Biotechnology, Biochemistry, Chemistry, Polymer Science, Food Science & Nutrition, or Food Technology, as well as B.E. or B.Tech degrees in Computer Science (with AI&ML) or Polymer Science/Food Science & Technology.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Project Associate - I posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Project Associate - I posts is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/PwBD/Women and OBC categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate - I position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000/- per month, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA) as applicable.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at CSIR – Central Food Technological Research Institute, Mysuru, Karnataka - 570020.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for the Project Associate - I posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification of the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for CSIR-CFTRI Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026?
